title: Fadah (Finally a Decent Auction House)
description: The perfect auctionhouse plugin you have been looking for!
body:
# Features
- Item Searching
- Item Filtering
- Allow players to set filters to get notified when a listing is made
- Infinite & Configurable Categories
- Custom GUI Layouts
- Multi Server and Multi Threaded environments supported
- Multiple Database Types Supported
- - SQLite
- - MySQL
- - MariaDB
- - MongoDB
- Fast Bug Fixes
- Used & battle tested in large production environments
- Listing Tax Permission
- Max Listings Permission
- Highly Configurable
- Transaction Logs
- Listing management for moderation!
- Migrate from your current plugin!
- - zAuctionHouse
- - AuctionHouse
- - AkarianAuctionHouse
- Hooks into common plugins!
- - EcoItems
- - PlaceholderAPI

AND MORE!

# Requirements:
- A Compatible Economy Plugin (May Require Vault)
- (Optional) A database (MySQL, MariaDB, MongoDB)
- (Optional) Redis

[Support](https://discord.gg/4KcF7S94HF)

[Documentation](https://docs.preva1l.info/fadah)

![Bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Finally%20a%20Decent%20Auction%20House.svg)

|Command               | Permission            |
|----------------------|-----------------------|
| /ah                  | fadah.use             |
| /ah help             | fadah.help            |
| /ah about            | fadah.use             |
| /ah sell <price>     | fadah.use             |
| /ah search <query>   | fadah.use             |
| /ah watch            | fadah.watch           |
| /ah toggle           | fadah.toggle-status   |
| /ah reload           | fadah.reload          |
| /ah profile [player] | fadah.profile         |
| /ah expired [player] | fadah.expired-items   |
| /ah redeem [player]  | fadah.collection-box  |
| /ah active [player]  | fadah.active-listings |
| /ah history [player] | fadah.history         |

| Permission                  | Description                                                |
|-----------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------|
| fadah.max-listings.<amount> | How many items the user can list on the auction house at any one time |
| fadah.listing-tax.<percent> | The percent a user should be taxed from the products price |
| fadah.advert-price.<amount> | How much an advert should cost                             |
| fadah.manage.<command>      | Allows the user to manage other peoples profiles etc       |
